comments.text:
p 180 is a power off one eighty maneuver
don't transcribe things that can't be heard

segments.text: Steinbach North traffic, GOLF WHISKEY JULIETT departing the circuit straight ahead climbing to two thousand feet, inbound Saint Andrews.

tlEdits.originalTranscript: Steinbach north traffic, GOLF WHISKEY JULIETT departing the circuit straight ahead climbing to two thousand feet, inbound Saint Andrews.

segments.text: Steinbach North, NOVEMBER MIKE ECHO CARAVAN, right hand downwind for, uh, runway three three, Steinbach North.

tlEdits.originalTranscript: Steinbach North, NOVEMBER MIKE ECHO SIERRA, right hand downwind for, uh, runway three three, Steinbach.

segments.text: Victoria tower, GOLF KILO MIKE YANKEE, downwind left traffic two seven, requesting a p one eighty for the touch and go.
KILO MIKE YANKEE, roger, you're number one and p one eighty approved.

tlEdits.originalTranscript: Victoria tower, GOLF KILO MIKE YANKEE, downwind left traffic two seven, request taking a one eighty for the touch and go. KILO MIKE YANKEE, roger, you're number one and a one eighty approved. number one and approved for the one eighty, GOLF KILO MIKE YANKEE.
